title: Taj Hotels Retail is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Taj Hotels Retail is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Taj Hotels Retail is actively seeking a talented and motivated Floor Manager to join our dynamic team in Pune. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Taj Hotels Retail:
Taj Hotels Retail is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in POS Systems

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Taj Hotels Retail!
